metadata.author: Ezekiel
metadata.placeOfWriting: In the land of the Chaldeans, by the river Chebar
metadata.subject: The Vision of the Glory of the Lord and the Recovery of the People of God for the Building of the House of God.

1: Now it happened in the thirtieth year, in the fourth month, on the fifth day of the month, as I was among the exiles by the river Chebar, that the heavens were opened and I saw visions of God.

As for the likeness of their faces, each had the face of a man; and the four had the face of a lion on the right side; and the four had the face of an ox on the left side; and the four had the face of an eagle.

Above the expanse that was over their heads was the likeness of a throne, in appearance like a sapphire stone; and upon the likeness of the throne was a likeness as the appearance of a man upon it above.
36: And I will give you a new heart, and a new spirit I will put within you; and I will remove the heart of stone out of your flesh, and I will give you a heart of flesh.
And I will put My Spirit within you and cause you to walk in My statutes, and my ordinances you shall keep and do.
37: The hand of Jehovah was upon me, and He brought me out in the Spirit of Jehovah and set me down in the middle of the valley, and it was full of bones.
So I prophesied as He commanded me, and the breath came into them, and they lived and stood up on their feet, an exceedingly great army.
47: Then he brought me back to the entrance of the house; and behold, water was flowing out from under the threshold of the house toward the east.
And it shall come to pass that every living creature that swarms, wherever the river goes, shall live.

26.text: The appearance of a man on the throne indicates that God's intention in His administration is to be expressed and represented through man.

10.text: The Hebrew word 'ruach' means breath, wind, or spirit. It is the life-giving Spirit of God that recovers His people from their death and scattered state.

1.text: The flow of water from the house of God signifies the river of life that issues from God's presence to bring life and healing to the earth.
